display_text: Enhancement Alert, Tier 1 / Non-purchasable: Neutral item providing a permanent buff to the player who equips it. Grants bonus attack speed and attack range bonus at higher tiers, as well as increasing night vision. Essential for heroes who rely on attacking from the shadows. Stats: Attack Speed: +10 / +17 / +24 / +31, Attack Range (Melee & Ranged): +0 / +0 / +0 / +100, Night Vision: +0 / +150 / +225 / +300.
